Grayscale Investments Reopens The Majority Of Its Crypto Trusts To New Investors
articles.description: New York-based digital asset manager Grayscale LLC has once again opened its doors to new investors for most of its crypto trusts. The company had paused taking on new investors in late December 2020. It’s not uncommon for Grayscale to temporarily pause on new investors. On Dec. 21, the fund halted six of its cryptocurrency […]

UK Treasury Says XRP Is Exchange Token and Not a Security
articles.description: The United Kingdom government appears to be cementing its position that XRP is an exchange token and not a security. Her Majesty’s Treasury has published a new document outlining the UK’s regulatory approach to cryptocurrencies and stablecoins. The report classifies XRP, Ethereum and Bitcoin as “tokens that are primarily used as a means of exchange.” […]
